snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) βÄ™ our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceXβÄôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee βÄ™ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipβÄôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10βÄôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXβÄôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverβÄôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Exceptional low tide sees Venice's canals run dry
snippet.description:
An exceptional low tide left¬†Venice's famous canals almost dry yesterday, with traditional gondolas and boats effectively beached as water levels reached a peak of -48 cm, creating an unusual landscape in the lagoon city.

Venice, beloved around the world for its canals, historic architecture and art, has always lived in a fragile balance between low and high tides, that usually create variations of around 50cm in sea levels.

Flooding is a constant concern in the¬†city built on a collection of small islands within a saltwater lagoon off the north-eastern coast of Italy, with every new incursion damaging its medieval and Renaissance palaces.

Venice's floods are caused by a combination of factors, exacerbated by climate change -- from rising sea levels and unusually high tides to land subsidence that has caused the ground level of the city to sink.

Venice's floods are caused by a combination of factors, exacerbated by climate change -- from rising sea levels and unusually high tides to land subsidence that has caused the ground level of the city to sink.

snippet.title: "OrbΟΓn Viktor legf≈ëbb szΟΕvetsΟ©gese voltam" | InterjΟΚ Fodor GΟΓborral | PartizΟΓnPolitika
snippet.description:
Fodor GΟΓbor hat (!) parlamenti ciklussal a hΟΓta mΟΕgΟΕtt a rendszervΟΓltΟΓs utΟΓni magyar politikatΟΕrtΟ©net egyik legnagyobb tΟΚlΟ©l≈ëje: alapΟ≠tΟ≥ tagja a Fidesznek, s≈ët, OrbΟΓn Viktort is megel≈ëzve (!!) a pΟΓrt legnΟ©pszer≈±bb politikusa, ΟΓm 1993-ban kiszorul a pΟΓrtbΟ≥l, Ο©s ΟΓtigazol a rivΟΓlis SZDSZ-hez. MiutΟΓn az SZDSZ koalΟ≠ciΟ≥ra lΟ©p az ≈ësellensΟ©g MSZP-vel, Fodor a M≈±vel≈ëdΟ©si Ο©s KΟΕzoktatΟΓsi MinisztΟ©rium Ο©lΟ©re kerΟΦl, igaz, mΟΓsfΟ©l Ο©v mΟΚlva lemondani kΟ©nyszerΟΦl. B≈ë tΟ≠z Ο©v kΟ©nyelmes parlamenti munka utΟΓn 2007-ben kΟΕrnyezetvΟ©delmi Ο©s vΟ≠zΟΦgyi miniszterrΟ© nevezik ki, de alig egy Ο©vvel kΟ©s≈ëbb vΟ©get Ο©r a liberΟΓlisok Ο©s a szocialistΟΓk se veled, se nΟ©lkΟΦled romΟΓnca, Ο≠gy ≈ë is tΟΓvozik a kormΟΓnybΟ≥l. 2010-ben az SZDSZ ΟΕsszeomlΟΓsa utΟΓn nem jut be az OrszΟΓggy≈±lΟ©sbe, de 2014-ben a LiberΟΓlisok elnΟΕkekΟ©nt a baloldali kΟΕzΟΕs lista negyedik (!) helyΟ©r≈ël ismΟ©t mandΟΓtumot szerez. 2018-ban viszont mΟΓr nem sikerΟΦl a bravΟΚr, Ο≠gy ΟΓtmenetileg (?) felhagy a politikΟΓval.

A PartizΟΓnPolitika mai adΟΓsΟΓban Fodor GΟΓborral a Fidesz megalakulΟΓsΟΓrΟ≥l, a Bokros-csomagrΟ≥l, szociΟΓlis Ο©rzΟ©kenysΟ©gr≈ël, Ο©s a 2010 utΟΓni ellenzΟ©ki hΟΓttΟ©ralkukrΟ≥l beszΟ©lgetΟΦnk, de termΟ©szetesen nem hagyjuk ki a legfontosabb kΟ©rdΟ©st sem: HOGYAN Ο•LTΟ•ZKΟ•DTEK A PUNKOK 1980-BAN GYΟ•NGYΟ•SΟ•N?

Tetszett az adΟΓs? Akkor szΟΓllj be a finanszΟ≠rozΟΓsunkba, legyΟ©l patronΟΓlΟ≥nk, Ο©s fΟ©rj hozzΟΓ az extra tartalmakhoz is! https://www.patreon.com/partizanpolitika

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Watch NASAβÄôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover βÄ™ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space βÄ™ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAβÄôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: NASAβÄôS Perseverance RoverβÄôs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASAβÄôs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the roverβÄôs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or βÄ€headβÄù) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on MarsβÄô Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for PerseveranceβÄôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planetβÄôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Four children thrown to safety from burning building in Istanbul
snippet.description:
A mother rescued four children by throwing them from a high window of an apartment that was on fire in Istanbul, Turkey. Neighbours caught the children with blankets spread out below as black smoke billowed from the building. Local authorities said the children were in good health. The mother was hospitalised as a precaution and then discharged

snippet.title: "Wir lassen uns nicht lΟΛnger einsperren!" βÄ™Tausende protestieren gegen Corona-Politik
snippet.description:
In der ungarischen Hauptstadt Budapest haben am Sonntag Tausende Menschen gegen die Corona-Politik demonstriert. Die Demonstration lief unter dem Motto: "Wir holen uns unser Leben zurΟΦck." Protestorganisator¬†GyΟΕrgy G≈ëdΟ©ny,¬†¬†ein¬†Apotheker und¬†COVID-19-Skeptiker, rief durch das Mikrofon den Menschen zu: "Wir lassen uns nicht lΟΛnger einsperren! HΟΕren Sie auf, uns Vorschriften zu machen, die keinen Sinn ergeben."

Die Demonstranten wurden von einer starken PolizeiprΟΛsenz begleitet. Die Beamten erklΟΛrten ΟΦber Lautsprecher, dass seit November alle Versammlungen verboten sind und forderte die Menschen auf, den Platz zu verlassen.

Seit dem 11. November gilt eine landesweite Ausgangssperre zwischen 20 Uhr abends und 5 Uhr morgens. Versammlungen von mehr als zehn Personen sind verboten, ebenso wie Veranstaltungen im Allgemeinen. Restaurants, Bars, Fitnessstudios und Theater bleiben geschlossen, und nur Grundschulkinder dΟΦrfen am Unterricht¬†im Klassenzimmer¬†teilnehmen.

snippet.title: 30 ΟârdekessΟ©g, amit nem tudtΟΓl a Harry Potter filmekr≈ël
snippet.description:
30. A Harry Potter filmek ΟΕsszesen 7770 milliΟ≥ dollΟΓrt vagy is kΟΕzel 2300 milliΟΓrd forintot termeltek a mozikban.
A 8 filmet ΟΕsszesen 12 Oscar dΟ≠jra jelΟΕltΟ©k, de egyet sem sikerΟΦlt bezsebelni.

29. A film producere David Heyman egy szΟ≠nhΟΓzi el≈ëadΟΓson, a kΟΕzΟΕnsΟ©g soraiban lΟΓtta meg Daniel Radcliffe-et, a kΟ©s≈ëbbi Harry Pottert. 
Ismerte a fiΟΚ apjΟΓt, Ο©s mΟΓsnap mΟΓr fel is vette vele a kapcsolatot, de azt nem tudta, hogy DanielΟ©ket mΟΓr Chris Columbus rendez≈ë is megkereste, akit visszautasΟ≠tottak. 
A producernek vΟ©gΟΦl mΟ©gis sikerΟΦlt rΟΓbeszΟ©lnie Daniel szΟΦleit, hogy fiΟΚk jΟΓtsza el azt a Harry Pottert, amire egyΟ©bkΟ©nt tΟΕbb mint 16.000 gyerek jelentkezett.

27. Stuart Craig lΟΓtvΟΓnytervez≈ë kapott a kΟΕnyvek Ο≠rΟ≥jΟΓtΟ≥l RownlingtΟ≥l egy rΟ©szletes rajzolt tΟ©rkΟ©pet Roxfort elhelyezkedΟ©sΟ©r≈ël, amit mΟ©g tΟ≠z Ο©vvel kΟ©s≈ëbb, az utolsΟ≥ film elkΟ©szΟ≠tΟ©sΟ©nΟ©l is felhasznΟΓltak.

26. A Harry Potter Ο©s a BΟΕlcsek KΟΕve rendezΟ©sΟ©re felmerΟΦlt Terry Gilliam, Alan Parker, Ο©s Steven Spielberg is. Spielberg a Hatodik Ο©rzΟ©k cim≈± film gyerek f≈ëszerepl≈ëjΟ©t szerette volna Harry szerepΟ©re, de J. K. Rowling Ο©s a Warner Bros. is ragaszkodott ahhoz, hogy angolok jΟΓtsszΟΓk a f≈ëszerepeket. 
Spielberg vΟ©gΟΦl azΟ©rt nem vΟΓllalta a film rendezΟ©sΟ©t, mert nem kapott volna teljes szabadsΟΓgot.

25. Az els≈ë rΟ©sz forgatΟΓsa naponta kΟΕzel 10 Ο≥rΟΓt vett igΟ©nybe, Ο≥rΟΓnkΟ©nt negyedΟ≥rΟΓs szΟΦnetekkel, ezΟ©rt a 3 f≈ëszerepl≈ë a forgatΟΓsi helyszΟ≠neken kialakΟ≠tott szobΟΓkban kΟ©szΟΦltek fel az iskolΟΓra magΟΓntanΟΓrokkal.
TovΟΓbbi Ο©rdekessΟ©g, hogy a BΟΕlcsek kΟΕve legels≈ë forgatΟΓsi napja a film befejez≈ë jelenetΟ©vel vette kezdetΟ©t.

24. A 7-es szΟΓm sokszor el≈ëfordul a Harry Potter univerzumban, mert ΟΕsszesen hΟ©t kΟΕnyv kΟ©szΟΦlt, a titkok kamrΟΓja ajtajΟΓn hΟ©t kΟ≠gyΟ≥ lΟΓthatΟ≥, 7 jΟΓtΟ©kos van egy kviddics csapatban, Ο©s ΟΕsszesen 7 Harry Potter indul ΟΚtnak a HalΟΓl EreklyΟ©i els≈ë rΟ©szΟ©ben.

22. A filmben ha Harry hozzΟΓΟ©r MΟ≥gus professzorhoz, akkor k≈ëvΟ© vΟΓlik Ο©s elporlad. 
A kΟΕnyvben viszont Ο©rintΟ©sre b≈ëre felhΟ≥lyagosodik, majd Ο©gΟ©si sΟ©rΟΦlΟ©sek keletkeznek a tanΟΓron.

19. A baziliszkusznak egy tΟΕbb mint 7 mΟ©ter hosszΟΚ robot makettjΟ©t Ο©pΟ≠tettΟ©k meg a filmhez, majd a nyakΟΓt m≈±kΟΕdtet≈ë hidraulikus szerkezetet kΟ©s≈ëbb felhasznΟΓltΟΓk a 4. rΟ©szben lΟΓthatΟ≥ Magyar MennydΟΕrg≈ë sΟΓrkΟΓnyhoz is.

18. A Harry Potter els≈ë Ο©s mΟΓsodik rΟ©szΟ©ben Richard Harris jΟΓtszotta Dumbledore-t, de a titkok kamrΟΓja vΟ©gΟ©n beteg lett Ο©s kΟ≥mΟΓba esett.

snippet.title: Emanet 131. BΟΕlΟΦm FragmanΡ± | Legacy Episode 131 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherβÄôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewβÄΠ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleβÄôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 130. BΟΕlΟΦm FragmanΡ± | Legacy Episode 130 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherβÄôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewβÄΠ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleβÄôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home - Official Teaser (2021) Tom Holland, Zendaya, Jacob Batalon
snippet.description:
Tom Holland, Zendaya and Jacob Batalon "accidentally" reveal the title for Marvel's Spider-Man 3, directed by Jon Watts. The movie's title is Spider-Man: No Way Home, and it will be released in theaters Christmas 2021.

========= Livgardet LYRICS =========

Smitt av eld och dalablod
Frusen mark och hjΟΛltemod
I en tid av krig de stod

Anor frΟΞn blott 16 man
Rikets ΟΛldsta stridsfΟΕrband

En tid
Av Krig

Vart vΟΛgen ΟΛn bΟΛr
Att beskydda, gardet svΟΛr
FΟΕr konung och rike de viger sitt liv

KnΟΛ om knΟΛ livgardet gΟΞr
KΟΛmpat fΟΕr landsfader vΟΞr
HΟΛngiven tjΟΛnst i 500 ΟΞr
FrΟΞn tΟΞget ΟΕver BΟΛlt
Stred vid Lund, pΟΞ Narvas fΟΛlt
De fΟΕlja uti hjΟΛltars spΟΞr

Oavsett vem kronan bΟΛr
Till sin konung trohet svΟΛr
I en tid, av fred, de bestΟΞr

Traditioner i frΟΞn fΟΕrr
Vaktar ΟΛnnu maktens dΟΕrr
I frid 
Och i strid

Vart vΟΛgen ΟΛn gΟΞr
Runt vΟΞr konung gardet stΟΞr
FΟΕr land och fΟΕr rike de offrar sitt liv

FΟΕr Sverige i tiden
Dit konungen gΟΞr
De gΟΕr vad som synes omΟΕjligt, vad ΟΛn framtiden spΟΞr

Vart vΟΛgen ΟΛn bΟΛr

Lyrics:
IβÄôm on an island
Even when youβÄôre close
CanβÄôt take the silence
IβÄôd rather be alone
I think itβÄôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
ItβÄôs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetβÄôs end this like we should and say weβÄôre good

WeβÄôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letβÄôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youβÄôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonβÄôt be pissed when I do it myself

Go get what you want

LetβÄôs end it like we should and say weβÄôre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬° winner Emma Stone (βÄ€La La LandβÄù) stars in DisneyβÄôs βÄ€Cruella,βÄù an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious βÄ™ and notoriously fashionable βÄ™ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. βÄ€Cruella,βÄù which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, EstellaβÄôs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬° winner Emma Thompson (βÄ€Howards End,βÄù βÄ€Sense & SensibilityβÄù). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬†
DisneyβÄôs βÄ€CruellaβÄù is directed by Craig Gillespie (βÄ€I TonyaβÄù) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (βÄ€Freaky FridayβÄù), Marc Platt (βÄ€Mary Poppins ReturnsβÄù) and Kristin Burr (βÄ€Christopher RobinβÄù), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬°- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (βÄ€Mad Max: Fury Road,βÄù βÄ€A Room with a ViewβÄù) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on βÄ€Cruella,βÄù follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬†https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersβÄ΄
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanβÄôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.
